source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clean English utility UI with Japanese typography guidance for task queues, inventory rows, route dashboards, command search, and calm operational status.
layout: Dense utility dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, mint-leaf actions, pale-stem focus states, white-flower highlights, and restrained green-gray borders.

prompts.label: Transparent Mint Sprig motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Mint Sprig transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fresh mint sprig, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a botanical mint sprig with cool green serrated mint leaves, pale angular stem, tiny white mint flowers at the tip, visible veins, natural herb-garden freshness, crisp opaque leaf and flower edges.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, clean studio lighting, fresh utility-system mood.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean bright herb-garden light that preserves cool greens, pale stem, and white flower detail; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: cool mint greens, pale green stem, white flower highlights, slightly deeper leaf vein greens only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no pot, no soil, no extra herbs, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Mint Sprig motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Mint Sprig".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: fresh utility system for task routing, garden operations, inventory, and quick admin work; crisp, utilitarian, refreshing, exact, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: cool mint leaf greens, deeper serrated leaf veins, pale green stems, white mint flowers, near-white flower highlights, soft herb-garden off-whites, cool green-gray shadows. Do not add generic blue, purple, orange, or unrelated saturated accents.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right navigation dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small mint sprig motif cutout preview.
Typography: clean English utility UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ミント", "作業一覧", "在庫", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, route queue cards, inventory table, activity chart, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle serrated leaf-edge dividers, fine mint leaf-vein texture, pale stem hairline rules, white flower status chips, compact 8px card rhythm, fresh utility grid.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no purple/blue UI defaults, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible Mint Sprig motif and the visible Morphous Mint Sprig light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Mint Sprig" with the same fresh utility-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: fresh utility system for task routing, garden operations, inventory, and quick admin work; night operations dashboard, crisp, utilitarian, refreshing, exact, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep mint-vein green backgrounds, cool dark herb shadows, fresh mint leaf primary controls, pale green stem highlights, white flower text highlights, cool green-gray borders. Avoid generic blue/purple UI defaults, orange warning palettes, neon colors, and pure black flat backgrounds.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right navigation dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small mint sprig motif cutout preview.
Typography: clean English utility UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ミント", "作業一覧", "在庫", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, route queue cards, inventory table, activity chart, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark serrated leaf-edge dividers, mint leaf-vein texture overlays, pale stem hairline rules, white flower status chips, compact 8px card rhythm, fresh utility grid.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
